rationale: For Portugal, the Iran deal's uncertain timing is the main story — it affects EU energy prices indirectly, which feeds into cost of living and the tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt on timing
top_events.summary: Iran's contradiction of Trump's timeline keeps uncertainty over a potential energy price relief for Europe. Portugal's economy is sensitive to EU-wide energy costs feeding into inflation.

top_events.title: Albania protests escalate over Kushner-backed coastal development
top_events.summary: Escalating protests in Albania over a major coastal development project are a minor regional note; no direct impact on Portugal.
